title: Unimaginative Speed
description: A lightweight modpack to optimize client
body:
# Unimaginative-Speed 
### it's a very fast optimized modpack for client
### Why modpack is more optimized than vanilla-client 
- Minecraft has a lot of problems with optimization, also with rendering and using memory, loading chunks and another
### Also you can try [Unimaginative Utilities](https://modrinth.com/modpack/unimaginative-utilities)

## Mods:
- ### Libraries:
	- [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed
	- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - library for essential hooks and interoperability 


- ### Optimization:
	- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Modern rendering engine and client-side optimization mod for Minecraft
	- [**Concurrent Chunk Management Engine**](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft
	- [**DashLoader**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader) - This mod accelerates the Minecraft Asset Loading system by caching all of its content, This leads to a much faster game load
	- [**Dynamic FPS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Dynamic FPS automatically reduces the speed at which Minecraft renders when it's not focused (to 1 FPS) or hidden (no renders at all)
	- [**EntityCulling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that are not visible
	- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - This mod reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways
	- [**ForgetMeChunk**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgetmechunk) - Mod that prevents light map unloads on the client, this eliminates the fps drops caused by crossing certain chunk borders
	- [**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
	- [**Indium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Indium is an addon for the rendering optimisation mod Sodium, providing support for the Fabric Rendering API
	- [**kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcecloseworldloadingscreen) - Instantly closes the loading terrain screen on world changing and drastically reduces the resource pack loading screen duration
	- [**Krypton**](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
	- [**Ksyxis**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis) - Speed up your world loading by not loading nearby chunks every time.
	- [**Language Reload**](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
	- [**LazyDFU**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization
	- [**More Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance
	- [**Reese's Sodium Options**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
	- [**Seaborgium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/seaborgium) - A slight rendering optimization mod for Minecraft, increasing the performance of the vanilla HUD 
	- [**Smooth Boot**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric) - Smooth Boot makes Minecraft load smoother and possibly faster by editing some parameters related to executors.
	- [**Sodium Extra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) -  in addition to providing some features such as visual bug fixes and other performance options that are not yet available on Sodium.
	- [**Starlight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Fabric mod for rewriting the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors.

### Unused optimization mods
- Why is there no **Exordium**
    - [**Exordium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) isn't compitable with custom gui like minimap and MiniHud, but you can download it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium)
- Why is there no **Enhanced Block Entities**
    - [**EBE**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) doesn't have version that supports minecraft 1.20.4
 #### If you have any questions, bugs, suggestions you can ask me in discord: _Fedor_F
